title.purpose: Link titles, partner names, FAQ questions, and compact actions.

body.purpose: Descriptions, FAQ answers, disclosures, and secondary copy.

label.purpose: Partner tags, tiny metadata, and coupon status.

shadows.name: profile-glow
shadows.value: blur-xl on a red-to-blue gradient halo
shadows.purpose: Anchors the profile image without making the whole page glow.

shadows.name: toast-float
shadows.purpose: Used for bottom support prompts that need to float above content.

shadows.name: neon-text-rare
shadows.purpose: Rare emphasis only, never body copy.

motion.name: state-standard
motion.purpose: Default state changes for buttons, borders, and background.

motion.name: card-lift
motion.purpose: Hover lift for link cards and featured partner surfaces.

components.name: Hero CTA
components.description: Compact ghost action for Twitch and email under the profile intro.
components.css: .ds-hero-cta{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;gap:8px;min-height:44px;min-width:120px;padding:10px 20px;border-radius:8px;border:1px solid rgb(255 255 255 / .10);background:rgb(255 255 255 / .04);color:#FFFFFF;font:500 14px/1.25 Inter,sans-serif;transition:background-color 220ms cubic-bezier(.22,1,.36,1),border-color 220ms cubic-bezier(.22,1,.36,1),transform 220ms cubic-bezier(.22,1,.36,1)}.ds-hero-cta svg{width:16px;height:16px;fill:currentColor}.ds-hero-cta:hover{background:rgb(255 255 255 / .08);border-color:rgb(252 12 60 / .40)}.ds-hero-cta:focus-visible{outline:2px solid #FCE4E4;outline-offset:2px}.ds-hero-cta:active{transform:scale(.985)}

components.name: Link Card
components.description: The canonical link row for socials, Steam, settings, and normal partner links.
components.html: DiscordJoin my Discord to chat with me and the community.↗
components.css: .ds-link-card{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:12px;padding:12px 16px;border-radius:12px;border:1px solid rgb(255 255 255 / .10);background:rgb(255 255 255 / .04);color:#FFFFFF;text-decoration:none;transition:transform 260ms cubic-bezier(.22,1,.36,1),background-color 260ms cubic-bezier(.22,1,.36,1),border-color 260ms cubic-bezier(.22,1,.36,1)}.ds-link-card:hover{transform:translateY(-2px);background:rgb(255 255 255 / .07);border-color:rgb(252 12 60 / .40)}.ds-link-card:focus-visible{outline:2px solid #FCE4E4;outline-offset:2px}.ds-icon-tile{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;flex:0 0 48px;width:48px;height:48px;border-radius:12px;border:1px solid rgb(255 255 255 / .05);background:rgb(255 255 255 / .06)}.ds-icon-tile svg{width:24px;height:24px;fill:#FC0C3C}.ds-link-copy{min-width:0;flex:1;display:grid;gap:2px}.ds-link-copy strong{font:600 15px/1.3 Inter,sans-serif;white-space:nowrap;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis}.ds-link-copy small{font:400 13px/1.35 Inter,sans-serif;color:rgb(255 255 255 / .55);white-space:nowrap;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis}.ds-external{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;width:36px;height:36px;border-radius:8px;border:1px solid rgb(255 255 255 / .10);color:rgb(255 255 255 / .55)}

components.name: Featured Partner
components.description: Prominent partner card with visible code and disclosure.
components.html:
Featured Partner
WWallHackUse code RATTE for 10% off.RATTE

Affiliate / Partner link. I may earn a commission at no extra cost to you.
components.css: .ds-featured{position:relative;padding:18px 20px 14px;border-radius:12px;border:1px solid rgb(252 12 60 / .30);background:rgb(255 255 255 / .04);color:#FFFFFF}.ds-featured-label{position:absolute;top:-10px;left:12px;padding:3px 8px;border-radius:9999px;border:1px solid rgb(252 12 60 / .30);background:rgb(252 12 60 / .20);color:#FC0C3C;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.05em;font:700 10px/1 Inter,sans-serif}.ds-featured-row{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:14px}.ds-partner-logo{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;width:48px;height:48px;border-radius:9999px;background:#FFFFFF;color:#0C0C0C;font:800 18px/1 Inter,sans-serif}.ds-featured code{padding:4px 8px;border-radius:6px;background:rgb(252 12 60 / .15);color:#FC0C3C;font:700 12px/1 ui-monospace,SFMono-Regular,Menlo,monospace}.ds-featured p{margin:12px 0 0;color:rgb(255 255 255 / .45);font:400 11px/1.4 Inter,sans-serif}.ds-featured:hover{border-color:rgb(252 12 60 / .55);background:rgb(255 255 255 / .07)}

components.name: FAQ Accordion
components.description: Quiet disclosure accordion for common trust and support questions.
components.html:
What's on this website?⌄

Links to all my socials, settings, Steam trading links, and partner links.
components.css: .ds-faq{border-radius:12px;border:1px solid rgb(255 255 255 / .10);background:rgb(255 255 255 / .04);color:#FFFFFF;overflow:hidden}.ds-faq summary{display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;gap:16px;min-height:44px;padding:16px 20px;cursor:pointer;list-style:none;font:600 14px/1.4 Inter,sans-serif}.ds-faq summary::-webkit-details-marker{display:none}.ds-faq summary:focus-visible{outline:2px solid #FC0C3C;outline-offset:-2px}.ds-faq p{margin:0;padding:0 20px 18px;color:rgb(255 255 255 / .65);font:400 14px/1.75 Inter,sans-serif}.ds-faq:hover,.ds-faq[open]{border-color:rgb(252 12 60 / .35)}

components.name: Partner Chip
components.description: Tiny red signal for partner status and coupon codes.

narrative.overview:
This system should feel like the current RatteCS page with the craft turned up: dark, compact, personal, and lightly atmospheric. The user should land, recognize Ratte immediately, and move through socials, partners, Steam links, settings, and FAQ without feeling sold to or slowed down.

The page is a focused creator hub, not a generic landing page. Red and blue ambience may shape the surface, but the content stays disciplined: profile first, links in stable rows, partner disclosure visible, and no decorative flourish that competes with the next click.
keyCharacteristics: Compact centered column with generous breathing room around sections.
Dark surface with red and blue environmental glow.
Soft translucent cards with precise borders instead of heavy shadows.
Small but clear text hierarchy, optimized for scanning.
Affiliate moments are visible and transparent, never spammy.

rules.name: The Red Signal Rule
rules.body: Ratte Red is a signal, not wallpaper. Use it for actions, verified partner emphasis, and meaningful hover states only.

rules.name: The Atmosphere Behind Content Rule
rules.body: Red and blue gradients belong behind the interface. They must never reduce text contrast or make cards harder to scan.

rules.name: The Scan First Rule
rules.body: Link titles must win over descriptions. Descriptions support the click, they do not compete with it.

rules.name: The No Hero Bloat Rule
rules.body: Do not turn this into a landing page with oversized slogans. Ratte is the headline; everything else supports navigation.

rules.name: The Flat At Rest Rule
rules.body: Link cards stay close to the surface at rest. Hover may lift and brighten; idle cards should not look like floating glass panels.

dos: Do keep the current moody red and blue atmosphere, but keep it behind content.
Do preserve the compact centered link-hub structure.
Do make partner disclosures visible wherever a partner link is promoted.
Do keep links scannable with strong titles, muted descriptions, and stable icon tiles.
Do maintain WCAG 2.1 AA contrast, especially on tiny partner metadata and muted copy.
Do use red for meaningful signals: partner emphasis, hover borders, coupon chips, and important action states.
Do honor reduced-motion preferences and keep transitions short, around 220ms to 260ms.
donts: Don't make this a generic Linktree clone.
Don't add loud esports neon clutter.
Don't push it toward over-polished SaaS marketing.
Don't turn the page into a broad landing page instead of a focused creator hub.
Don't erase the current vibe, make the page too bright, bury partner disclosures, or make affiliate links feel deceptive or spammy.
Don't use gradient text, side-stripe card accents, nested cards, or decorative glassmorphism.
Don't use oversized hero slogans, hero metrics, or repeated generic icon-card grids.
